sources.title: So Far So Close Clip Reza Mirkarimi 2005
sources.description: SO CLOSE, SO FAR Kheili dour, kheili nazdik Directed by Reza Mirkarimi Iran, 2005 Drama 121 min. Synopsis The story is full of beautiful scenes of the desert.

metadata.Plot: Dr. Alam, a very profiled specialist in neurology and a successful surgeon, is drowned in his professional and social work, in a way that he has totally forgotten all about his son Saman. Samantha the beautiful nights of desert with it starfull sky attracts Saman to itself and the young boy falls in love with night sky and observation of stars. Due to an event the doctor leaves his profession and work behind and goes through the desert to find his son.
metadata.Actors: Alireza Phoenix, Masoud Rayegan, Afshin Hashemi
